commit_message:
Bug Fixes and Cleanup Bug Fixes and Cleanup Files updated:

1. generic_mem_model.sv : Fix the read memory latency to 1 cycle
2. dfd_trace_sink.sv: Bug fixes on pointer updates in SRAM/SMEM modes
3. dfd_te_encoder.sv: Bug fixes on Privmodes, timing fixes and cleanup
